scripts.db:migrate: tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && node dist/database/copy-migrations.js && node dist/migrate.js up
scripts.db:status: tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && node dist/database/copy-migrations.js && node dist/migrate.js status
scripts.db:verify: tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && node dist/database/copy-migrations.js && node dist/migrate.js verify
